briefdescription.para: UUIDs of Nordic UART GATT Service.
Macro to define instance of NUS Service.

detaileddescription.para: It allows users to define multiple NUS instances, analogous to Serial endpoints, and use each one for different purposes. A default NUS instance may be defined through Kconfig.
This function registers callbacks that will be called in certain events related to NUS.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to instance of NUS service. NULL if using default instance.
Pointer to callbacks structure. Must be valid throughout the lifetime of the application.
User context to be provided through the callback.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_nus_inst *inst, const void *data, uint16_t len)
memberdef.name: bt_nus_inst_send

simplesect.para: This API sends the data to the specified peer.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object to send data to. NULL if notifying all peers.
Pointer to instance of NUS service. NULL if using default instance.
Pointer to buffer with bytes to send.
Length in bytes of data to send.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code if failed.
-EAGAIN when Bluetooth stack has not been enabled.
-ENOTCONN when either no connection has been established or no peers have subscribed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to callbacks structure. Must be valid throughout the lifetime of the application.
User context to be provided through the callback.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code if failed.
This API sends the data to the specified peer.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object to send data to. NULL if notifying all peers.
Pointer to buffer with bytes to send.
Length in bytes of data to send.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code if failed.
-EAGAIN when Bluetooth stack has not been enabled.
-ENOTCONN when either no connection has been established or no peers have subscribed.
